title: Showdown Series I™ - New World
description: Showdown Series I™ - New World adds to your Minecraft: Items and Magic Mechanics, a remastered End Dragon battle, new biomes and structures, a major overhaul of the End and the Nether, new armor, swords, artifacts, mobs, furniture, and more.
body:
## Showdown Series I™ - New World | The necessary ModPack for your game

**Creators:**
- Legend 1V4/LegendGG
- Arcanjo YT/Arcanjo_unknown

**YouTube Links:**
- [Legend 1V4 - Channel](https://www.youtube.com/@Legend_1V4)
- [Arcanjo YT - Channel](https://www.youtube.com/@Arcanjo_Mi)

# **━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━**

## Showdown Series I™ - New World

- This ModPack is the first part of a new great saga in the Showdown ModPack series, Showdown Series I, providing you with a new world full of possibilities and adventure, giving your Minecraft a fresh new look.

- In this new adventure, you'll find new biomes, dungeons, mobs, items, and much more.

- Explore and conquer this new world. You can become a master of magic, an alchemist using Project E, a great warrior in overpowered armor, the owner of a zoo with incredible new mobs, take flight with the wings of the mighty Icarus, a conquest of dangerous dungeons with items from Minecraft Dungeons, an artifact hunter with ancient runes and amulets, or build your dream home with new furniture.

- This ModPack has great shader support.

- Various textures to make your Minecraft look better.
- Excellent optimization.

- Over 130+ different mods.

**Exploration, adventure, combat, building, magic & plenty to do!**

**Showdown Series I™ - New World,** **The essential modpack full of possibilities**

![Banner do Mod-Pack](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cc956f44369a9289a0d274255ffb8c32b6341f92_0.webp)
